description: Replace hard-coded setTimeout sleeps with polling helpers in side-panel-focused E2E tests, and fix the lazy-loading issue in side-panel-npm-search.e2e.ts where npm execSync calls at module load time block every Playwright worker for 15-30 seconds. After this lands, side panel tests use deterministic waits and npm calls are deferred to test execution time.

userStories.title: Replace sleeps in side-panel-plugin-update and side-panel-reload tests
userStories.description: Replace hard-coded 3s and 2s sleeps in side-panel-plugin-update.e2e.ts (lines 470, 556) and side-panel-reload.e2e.ts (line 224) with condition-based polling. These tests wait for UI state changes that can be polled via Playwright's toBeVisible/toHaveCount assertions.
acceptanceCriteria: side-panel-plugin-update.e2e.ts has no 3-second sleep at lines 470 and 556; uses Playwright assertions with timeouts instead
side-panel-reload.e2e.ts has no 2-second sleep at line 224; uses waitForLog or Playwright assertion instead

userStories.title: Replace sleeps in side-panel-accordion-persist and lazy-load npm calls in side-panel-npm-search
userStories.description: Replace 500ms sleeps in side-panel-accordion-persist.e2e.ts (lines 67, 83) that wait for chrome.storage.session writes, and move npm execSync calls in side-panel-npm-search.e2e.ts from module-load time to lazy test.beforeAll to stop blocking Playwright workers for 15-30s even when tests are skipped.
acceptanceCriteria: side-panel-accordion-persist.e2e.ts has no 500ms sleeps before reopening the side panel; uses a short delay or Playwright's page.waitForFunction if needed
side-panel-npm-search.e2e.ts does not call execSync at module-load time (lines 41-71 area); npm search/view calls are inside test.beforeAll or similar lazy initialization
